scope.target: One canonical dotnet-backend distribution profile and package envelope
constraints: Exclude source history and target truth
non_goals: Build archives before the contract stabilizes

validation: Every tracked candidate path has a disposition
No ignored local config enters the profile
execution.last_completed_step: Defined the allowlist, exclusions, ownership classes, deterministic envelope, publication boundary, and metadata schemas.
execution.next_action: AIPKG-002 creates the declared empty template and runtime-adapter entries.

results.summary: Established one machine-readable dotnet-backend distribution profile with 22 allowlist entries, six deny boundaries, and fail-safe ownership semantics.
results.residual_risk: Entries marked allow_empty_until must be populated by AIPKG-002 and rejected before release-candidate build.
